name: Nomic v1.5 Fine-tuned (Pipe Format)
description: Evaluation of nomic-embed-text-v1.5 fine-tuned on domain triplets with pipe serialization. Matryoshka + MNRL loss, 3 epochs with curriculum hard negative ratio, batch_size=256.
notes: Primary fine-tuned experiment. This is the main hypothesis test. Expect significant improvement over 002 (zero-shot) on all corruption buckets.
